previews.name: Hogwarts parchment interface

visualHypothesis.mood: warm parchment, antique magic desk, bookish ceremony
visualHypothesis.colorDirection: dark brown canvas, parchment text, antique gold CTA and border

previews.reason: Best matches the official site structure and keeps UI colors separate from media illustrations.

previews.name: Dark combat magic HUD

visualHypothesis.mood: dark duel arena, high-contrast magic effects

previews.reason: It overfits game combat visuals and would incorrectly push media glow into semantic tokens.

previews.name: Gallery-led magical world

visualHypothesis.mood: illustrated wizarding world, scenic and collectible
visualHypothesis.colorDirection: painted scene colors, parchment overlays, gold labels

previews.reason: Useful for media/component pattern evidence, but scene colors remain demo-only assets.

formalMigrationInput.notes: Proceed with parchment UI tokens and keep character art, scenes, blue glow and ornate borders in demoOnlyVisualControls.
